name: io.github.iqbalahmed7/simulatte
description: Run synthetic research studies from any MCP-compatible AI client. 25+ SKUs including Concept Viability, Claim Credibility, B2B Buying Committee, Depth Interview, and cross-study semantic search.

environmentVariables.name: SIMULATTE_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your Simulatte workspace API key (format: sim_live_…). Generate one at https://app.simulatte.io/settings/api-keys

environmentVariables.name: SIMULATTE_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the Simulatte API. Defaults to https://app.simulatte.io/api — only override for self-hosted or staging environments.
